title: Silky Haricot Surprise
description: A show-off Mexican dish featuring haricot beans that are fried until crispy and silky smooth, perfect for a snack or dessert offering.
instructions: If using, lightly dust the haricot beans with flour.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat until shimmering hot but not smoking.
Add the haricot beans and cook for about 3-5 minutes or until golden brown on all sides. Stir occasionally to ensure even browning.
Remove from heat immediately after cooking, as the beans continue to cook in the pan.
Sprinkle salt over the fried haricot beans while still hot, tossing gently to coat evenly.
